name: command-execution
description: Test command execution with environment variables
scenario: Set up environment variables for a Python application, then use exec to run the application. Demonstrate exit code passthrough by running commands that exit with different codes. Show how to handle errors from executed commands.
success_criteria: Sets up environment variables for application
Uses exec command to run Python script
Demonstrates exit code passthrough (command exits with non-zero code)
Shows how to capture and check exit codes
Handles command not found errors (exit code 10)
Explains how environment variables are injected
anti_patterns: Not checking exit codes from exec
Not handling command not found errors
Forgetting to use -- separator before command
Not verifying environment variables are injected
